subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost put thy trust in God! Strive with all thy might, that thou mayest become a servant of the Word of Unity and a worshiper of the glorious Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوکل علی الله جهدی نما تا خادم کلمه توحید گردی و ساجد حضرت رب مجید تو
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
